title: A4: Delete physical dead weight (dashboard, root /templates, werewolf-stub, 思路.md)
scope: packages/dashboard + templates/ + examples/werewolf-minigame-stub + 思路.md + docs
description: Delete v1.x dead weight. packages/dashboard/ entire package (rules-explain SPA, 31 hits of L0/L1/L2/topology, zero v2.0 knowledge awareness). packages/server/src/api/static.ts + http.ts registerDashboardStatic wiring + dashboardDistPath option. Root templates/ directory (CLI source has zero references; authoritative copy is packages/cli/templates/). Root 思路.md (AGENTS.md-era pre-pivot concept). examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/ (v1.x Cocos demo target). docs/contributing.md lines referencing dashboard build. Update pnpm-workspace.yaml or package.json to drop @fenglimg/fabric-dashboard reference. Evidence: exploration-codebase.json#module_map.dashboard.

files.change: Delete root templates directory (CLI source has authoritative copy)
Drop dashboard package entry if listed
Strip dashboard-related scripts and workspace entry if present

implementation: Grep for @fenglimg/fabric-dashboard imports across packages/server and packages/cli
Update http.ts: remove registerDashboardStatic call and dashboardDistPath option from FabricHttpOptions
Delete templates/ at repo root (preserve packages/cli/templates/)
Edit docs/contributing.md: remove dashboard build section
Update pnpm-workspace.yaml and root package.json to drop dashboard refs
pnpm install && pnpm -w build to verify

reference.examples: Mirror dashboard removal cleanly; ensure no cross-package imports break

criteria: Deleted from disk: packages/dashboard/ entire package, templates/ root directory, examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/, 思路.md
pnpm-workspace.yaml or package.json no longer references @fenglimg/fabric-dashboard
packages/server/src/api/static.ts deleted and http.ts has no registerDashboardStatic / dashboardDistPath references
docs/contributing.md has no dashboard build instructions
pnpm install completes cleanly; pnpm -w build succeeds

rationale.chosen_approach: Wholesale delete; no users depend on dashboard or v1.x werewolf stub
decision_factors: exploration evidence: dashboard has 31 L0/L1/L2 hits and zero knowledge awareness
rationale.tradeoffs: Lose ability to demo v1.x rules SPA; acceptable given pivot direction

manual_checks: fabric serve starts cleanly without dashboard

risks.description: External docs/blog posts link to dashboard URL
risks.mitigation: Pre-publish v2.0.0 means zero external exposure
risks.fallback: Add 410 Gone redirect note in README
